prompt_contract.alternative_hypothesis: One branch advances the canonical head and the stale branch is preserved but quarantined.
prompt_contract.falseability_condition: Fail if canonical head is missing, if equivocation_count != 1, or if quarantined memory appears in default context.
prompt_contract.kill_switch: Abort if a token/header/full raw prompt is persisted.
prompt_contract.null_hypothesis: Two concurrent agents writing from one observed parent either corrupt state or both enter default context.
